summary: A vertical stylized clip, posted by the account, with a desaturated, high-contrast treatment and the burned-in caption 'WE WILL NOT BE STOPPED'. The sampled frames show a man in a green tactical uniform and body armor with his arm raised amid a crowd, a close shot of his face, and another close shot of a man in a tactical helmet and a vest with a 'BORDER PATROL FEDERAL AGENT' marking and a badge. The clip cuts between close action shots.

script.scene: A man in a green tactical uniform and body armor raises his arm amid a crowd; caption 'WE WILL NOT BE STOPPED'.
A close shot of the man's face under the same caption.
A close shot of a man in a tactical helmet and a vest marked 'BORDER PATROL FEDERAL AGENT' with a badge.

notable_text: WE WILL NOT BE STOPPED; BORDER PATROL FEDERAL AGENT
